agents.name: MN2 Scout
agents.role: Explores the catalog and buys small coin-priced boosts with MN2 balance.
agents.default_item_hint: Pick any coin-priced item from GET /api/shop/items or shop UI.
agents.notes: Set bound_user_id to a real game_user_id that holds MN2, or pass user_id in execute-mn2-purchase.

agents.name: MN2 Curator
agents.role: Maintains inventory themes; uses execute-mn2-purchase with your configured user_id.
agents.notes: Requires AGENT_MN2_SHOP_SECRET on the server and sufficient mn2_balance for the target user.
